hero.badge: Coming soon · being shaped with our first teams
hero.subtitle: We're in early access. We'd rather set the plans with the first teams than publish numbers we'd have to walk back later. Leave your email and you'll be among the first to see them.

form.title: Tell me when pricing is live
form.sub: No spam · just the launch announcement
form.sentBody: We'll email {email} as soon as the plans are published.

cards.title: Free to start
cards.desc: An entry plan at no cost so you can try the full cycle before deciding.

cards.title: No surprises
cards.desc: Pay for what you use — no hidden modules, no integration fees. What you see is what you pay.

cards.title: One single platform
cards.desc: ATS, HRIS and payroll in one price, not five separate licenses to add up every month.

meanwhile.title: Explore the product that's already in production.
meanwhile.body: ATS, HRIS and the payroll engine, with agentic AI inside every task. See it working — not in slides.
